description: In the Settings dialog of a draft document with a CC recipient, the timezone dropdown is interactive and allows selecting a different timezone value.
steps: Click the 'Document Settings' button in the left sidebar Quick Actions
Wait for the 'Document Settings' dialog heading to appear
Click the timezone dropdown/select element in the Settings dialog
Select a different timezone value from the dropdown options (e.g., 'America/New_York' or any other available option)
Take screenshot showing the timezone dropdown with the newly selected value
